---
title : "Mitigating the Political Participation Gap from the School. {{The}} Roles of Civic Knowledge and Classroom Climate"
date : "2015-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel; Bonhomme, Macarena; Cox, Cristian & Bascope, Martin"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Journal of Youth Studies, 18(1) 16--35  [https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199](https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199)"
publication_short : "Journal of Youth Studies, 18(1) 16--35  [https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199](https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel; Bonhomme, Macarena; Cox, Cristian & Bascope, Martin (2015). *Mitigating the Political Participation Gap from the School. {{The}} Roles of Civic Knowledge and Classroom Climate*. Journal of Youth Studies, 18(1) 16--35  [https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199](https://doi.org/10.1080/13676261.2014.933199)

:::
